description: This pipeline takes TrackMate spots and converts them into ROI, the main steps involve taking the input from a source node that is not defined in this graph but should be connected to the trackmate-spots-to-roi node, then the trackmate-spots-to-roi node converts these spots into ROI which are then used as an output

6d30c68f-8849-4891-bd93-eca41b9a042e.name: ij1-roi-relation-2d
6d30c68f-8849-4891-bd93-eca41b9a042e.description:
Extracts all pairwise statistics between the 2D ROI

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
